completed_tasks.name: Capture Phase 1 context and discussion log
Record phase context session in STATE.md
Research Phase 1 and add validation strategy

remaining_tasks.name: Run plan verification and revise if needed
Record phase as planned in STATE.md

blockers.description: gsd-planner subagents timed out twice on Windows without writing any PLAN.md files
blockers.workaround: After a planner timeout, inspect the phase directory immediately. If no plan files exist after one narrowed retry, switch to local plan authoring instead of waiting longer.

decisions.decision: Keep salon-wide data in content/site.ts and split booking-specific rules/copy into content/booking.ts
decisions.rationale: This is the simplest professional boundary split and avoids over-fragmenting the content model.

decisions.decision: Direct visits to /termin-buchen in contact_only should show a friendly fallback page instead of redirecting
decisions.rationale: This preserves a safe entry for bookmarks and search traffic while still honoring the disabled booking mode.

decisions.decision: Contact visibility stays salon-configurable in both modes and no channel is hidden only because booking is enabled
decisions.rationale: The salon should decide whether phone, email, and WhatsApp appear.

decisions.decision: Real booking and admin flows stay physically separate from brochure surfaces
decisions.rationale: This protects BUIL-01 and BUIL-02 before booking complexity grows.

next_action: Start from the phase-prompt template and write 01-01-PLAN.md, 01-02-PLAN.md, and 01-03-PLAN.md locally using 01-CONTEXT.md, 01-RESEARCH.md, and 01-VALIDATION.md; then run plan verification.
context_notes: Pause happened mid /gsd-plan-phase for Phase 1. Context, discussion log, research, and validation are all committed. The blocking issue is agent transport reliability on Windows: the researcher wrote its file but never returned a completion marker, and the planner timed out twice without writing plan artifacts. Resume by planning locally rather than spending more time on hanging planner agents.
